calendar.matters:
Petition For Review Of Estate And Trust Of Frances Cable Distribution Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ward Haynes, Jr. in Propria Persona. Dennis Vann for and with Wilhelminia Cato. Felipe Haynes (granddaughter) also present.

The Court stated that this petition was filed in the estate case but is actually in regards to the trust matter and that the relief requested needs to be stated. Mr. Vann stated that it is their intention to prepare an accounting, that they have the bank statements but need to obtain the cancelled checks. The Court explained to Mr. Haynes that the estate matter is closed, that everything has been transferred to the trust and that the parties need to talk to each other and possibly work the issues out. Mr. Haynes confirmed that he would need to file the petition in the trust matter and expressed his concern regarding the funds being spent. The petition for review of estate and trust of Frances Cable was taken off calendar by the court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Termination Of Trust And Estate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Wilhemenia Cato and David Cato.

Mr. Vann stated that last year after he had met with Ward Haynes and Ward Hayne's Son that Mr. Haynes informed him that he did not wish to proceed with the petition and that he would be sending an accounting to Mr. Vann. Mr. Vann also stated that Mr. Haynes was probably not present in Court today because he did not wish to proceed with the petition. The Court ordered today's matter off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Termination Of Trust And Estate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Continued To Jan-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Wilhemina Cato. Ward Haynes in Propira Persona. Ward Haynes Jr. was also present.

The court explained that notice needed to be served on all entitled Parties, the Trustee and the trust Beneficiaries and that a proof of service needed to be filed. Mr. Vann expressed concern about Mr. Ward not having a full understanding of the petition and stated that he did not receive the budget information he requested. Mr. Ward Jr. stated that his Father did not want to come back to court. The matter was continued to January 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If there is no appearance, or if proper notice is not served, the matter will go off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-12-2009 Continued To Jun-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1131 Hollister Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Jan-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for David Cato and Wilhemena Cato (Co-Executor's).

The sale was confirmed at $450,000.00, (order for the same signed in open court). Bond was waived.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1131 Hollister Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Continued To Jan-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DENNIS VANN FOR WILHELMINA CATO, CO-EXECUTOR;

THE COURT RAISED SOME CONCERNS REGARDING THE SPECIAL NOTICE OR PROOF OF MAILING OF 2 NOTICES. MR. VANN WAS NOT AWARE OF THESE NOTICES AND REQUESTED THAT THE MATTER BE CONTINUED TO ALLOW HIM TO GIVE PROPER NOTICE. THE REQUEST OF MR. VANN TO APPOINT MRS. CATO AS THE SOLE EXECUTOR BECAUSE OF HER HUSBAND'S INCAPACITY WAS ALSO RAISED BY THE COURT. IF MR. CATO IS INCAPACITATED, SHE CAN ACT UNDER THE AUTHORITY IN PROBATE CODE 9630 (C). IF ONE EXECUTOR CANNOT ACT, THE REMAINING EXECUTOR CAN ACT FOR A SPECIFIC PURPOSE TO ENABLE HER TO EXECUTE OR COMPLETE THE SALE. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 14, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lee.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearences by B. D. James, atty. for petitioner, D. Cato & W. Cato,co-petitioner,W. Haynes, heir.
W. Haynes attorney advised him not to pursue will contest.
Judge:Dorothy McMath, Clerk:Larrisa Dotson, Rptr:Christina Paxton, Baliff:Mizota

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2006 Continued To Jul-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Benjamin James appearing for and with petitioners, David and Wilhemenia Cato. Ward Haynes, son and Ward Haynes, Jr., grandson are in court. Mr. Haynes is objecting to the will and he wants more time to get counsel. Matter is continued to 7/31 with no further continuance. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Continued To Jul-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This petition was pregranted. Yolanda Haynes, Kevin Haynes, Ward Haynes and Phillippa Haynes, the grandchildren of the decedent and Ware Haynes, the son and Coreen Smith, former daughter in-law appear in court to object to the petition. Court is vacating the pregranted order and is continuing this matter to 7/17 and advising the son to seek counsel. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
